title: OPC discontinues additional complaints against Globe24h.com following investigation into same privacy issues
summary: Multiple complainants alleged that the operator of the website Globe24h.com (“Globe24h”) collected, used and disclosed their personal information without consent, and for inappropriate purposes. Specifically, the complainants alleged that Globe24h was republishing Canadian court and tribunal decisions—which contained their personal inform...
